name: Ginger Orange Cream Cheese Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Ginger marmalade or chopped preserved ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the cream cheese, orange juice, ginger marmalade (or chopped preserved ginger), and honey.
2. Blend until smooth and fluffy.
3. Mix in the grated orange rind.
4. The mixture will yield about 1-1/4 cups.
